title: Radom Network brings native crypto payment rails to Cryptool
content_html:
Crypto subscriptions, contributor payouts, recurring revenue collection. Three workflows that quietly burn the most time inside any crypto-first business, and the three Radom Network turns into a single API call.

From today, those rails sit underneath Cryptool. Teams running pools and funds on the platform get predictable cash flow in crypto without the spreadsheet work that usually rides alongside it. Radom Network handles the payment side; Cryptool handles everything that happens on top of it.
author: Cryptool
